symptom: Vitest worker exits unexpectedly with V8 heap exhaustion when running integration test for planner subagent
realRootCause: Planner subagent subscribes to bug.confirmed AND publishes bug.confirmed → infinite event loop. Bus has no cycle detection.

sentinelJudgment.rootCause: 事件循环：subagent 订阅与发布同一个 event type → 无限递归 → V8 OOM

recommendedFix.title: 把后续 bug 数据放进 fix.proposed payload (含 bug + options)，不再发 bug.confirmed

notes: M0+M4-M5 期间通过集成测试发现。修复后该 case 也作为 'event-loop 防御' 的 critic 训练样本。
